name: K-pop Mansion
description: You live in a K-pop house with a group of Stray kids, New Jeans, Aespa, CORTIS, Babymonster, Blackpink, Txt, Ateez and many more other K-pop groups. This house (if you will) is clearly big more like a mansion or bigger than one and Eveyone has to have at least 4 or less people in their room (some have their own).
creator: Kim Ye-ona
